channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Best Chagos Deal Is No Deal
item.description: The Trump administration should step up political pressure on Starmer to change course.

item.title: How Congress Can Rein In Rogue Federal Judges
item.description: It is time for Congress to rethink its federal statutes that govern the discipline of judges.

item.title: AI notetakers are creating HR nightmares
item.description: The meeting ends. The AI doesn’t.

item.title: US forces hunt down and board tanker ship defying Trump admin quarantine
item.description: U.S. forces boarded the ship that defied President Donald Trump's quarantine of sanctioned ships in the Caribbean, according to the War Department.

item.title: Here’s Where Prosecutors Should Look For More Evidence Of Somali Daycare Fraud
item.description: Prosecuting those involved with sham daycare centers should be relatively easy, using an assortment of readily available financial records.

item.title: How Sheikh Tahnoon Bought the UAE’s Way into Trump World
item.description: When Trump won the 2024 election, Tahnoon saw his opportunity to influence the U.S. government.

item.title: Cornyn trails Paxton in Texas Senate GOP primary; Crockett leads Talarico in Democratic race
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn's reelection bid is looking shaky in Texas.

item.title: The Verdict Is In: Everyone Hates Southwest’s New Seat And Boarding Rules
item.description: Southwest’s new assigned seating has put its reputation with Americans who have loved the brand through other turbulence at risk.

item.title: Cuomo Getting A Radio Show Instead Of Prison Proves There’s A Two-Tiered Justice System
item.description: Maybe we should wait until the criminal investigation is over before we hand out radio shows. Maybe facing consequences should come before rehabilitat...

item.title: Federal judge orders Fulton County election raid documents to be unsealed
item.description: A federal judge gave the government until Tuesday to release a redacted search warrant affidavit from a January FBI raid that seized 2020 election mat...

item.title: The Super Bowl reveals a dangerous gap in corporate strategy
item.description: Every Super Bowl tends to follow a predictable pattern: massive marketing investment followed by temporary commercial impact.

item.title: Weight Watchers CEO: what the GLP-1 Super Bowl ads are missing
item.description: Those ads don’t show what happens next. How do people sustain results over time? And what does a healthy, livable lifestyle look like?

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads Fifth Amendment, dodges questions in House Oversight Epstein probe
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell refused to answer questions before the House Oversight Committee on Monday morning.

item.title: GOP accelerates Trump judge confirmations as pressure builds to kill Senate blue slip
item.description: President Donald Trump called for eliminating the blue slip tradition, but Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., warned that "nuking the blue slip would be a huge...

item.title: OpenAI vs. Anthropic Super Bowl ad clash signals we’ve entered AI’s trash talk era—and the race to own AI agents is only getting hotter
item.description: From Super Bowl ads to social media sniping, the rivalry has spilled beyond benchmarks into a fight over brand, trust, and who AI agent marketshare

item.title: If SCOTUS Bans Illegals From The Census, Dems Could Lose Power For Years
item.description: Census figures used for congressional apportionment, redistricting, and redistributing federal funds have historically counted illegal aliens.

item.title: Hochul running mate voted to allow noncitizen voting in NYC elections
item.description: Empire State Gov. Kathy Hochul's running mate Adrienne Adams previously sought to allow some noncitizens to vote in Big Apple municipal elections.

item.title: Meet the 10 Black Fortune 500 CEOs leading companies with over $412 billion in combined revenues
item.description: Black CEOs represent just 2% of the largest U.S. corporations.

item.title: Puerto Rico stops for 13 minutes to applaud history and bask in Bad Bunny's glow
item.description: The Super Bowl lasted all of 13 minutes for many Puerto Ricans in San Juan and beyond.

item.title: Thirty Candles for the Internet’s Foundation
item.description: Internet free speech is celebrating its 30th birthday — if Section 230’s opponents don’t spoil the party, that is.

item.title: We Need a Private-Sector Overhaul of U.S. Space Exploration
item.description: The scrubbed Artemis launch is the latest saga of an inefficient, unfocused government-run space program.

item.title: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore says Democrats have 'oligation' to consider new congressional map
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore says the Maryland state Senate has an "obligation to vote" on legislation to redraw the state's congressional map -- a move Democrats h...

item.title: Goodbye, Kostyantynivka
item.description: Not too long ago, the eastern Ukrainian city helped build my family. Now, the town is little more than ruins.

item.title: Nicaraguan government blocks key pathway used by Cuban migrants to reach United States
item.description: Nicaragua's government on Sunday blocked Cuban citizens from entering the country without a visa, effectively cutting off a key route for Cuban migrat...

item.title: DOJ reaches legal settlement declaring Biden's border 'parole' to be unlawful
item.description: The Trump administration has quietly struck a legal settlement that not only ends one of President Biden's mass migrant "parole" programs but could bl...

item.title: Stockholm’s Capital Markets Success: More Than Meatballs
item.description: Stockholm’s capital-market success reflects more than IPOs and PE activity. It offers a case study in how culture, institutions, and incentives shape ...

item.title: Where AI Ends and Investment Judgment Begins
item.description: AI’s growing capabilities challenge traditional investment skill, shifting competitive advantage toward governance, process, and judgment. The post Wh...

item.title: Three Risks of Relying on the S&P 500 in Retirement Planning
item.description: Why S&P 500 reliance can undermine retirement outcomes, and how diversification, valuation discipline, and withdrawals reshape long-term portfolio ris...

item.title: Book Review: Principles of Bitcoin
item.description: A rigorous exploration of bitcoin reveals a new framework for understanding money beyond traditional financial models. The post Book Review: Principle...

item.title: AI Strategy After the LLM Boom: Maintain Sovereignty, Avoid Capture
item.description: Yann LeCun’s testimony reframed for investment leaders: why AI sovereignty, platform control, and LLM economics shape organizational risk. The post AI...
